Rachel woke up in a hospital room, unable to speak. The words in her mind wouldn't come out of her mouth. Her daughter held her hand and said, "You will be fine, Mom, because you have me." But Rachel wondered: if she couldn't speak, was she still herself? Could broken things become beautiful again? This is the story of how Rachel learned that recovery isn't about becoming who you were before. It's about discovering who you can become, one small step at a time.
